stemHtml:
Refer to figure or VFR chart ED-4 from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
Which option would be best visual point for a pilot flying VFR in the vicinity of Albstadt Degerfeld aerodrome (EDSA) (N48°15' E009°04')?

options.a: The village TROCHTELFINGEN about 8 NM east-north-east of EDSA.
options.b: The natural high point with elevation 2638 about 8 NM east of EDSA.
options.c: The T junction of the railway near GAMMERTINGEN about 6 NM east of EDSA.
options.d: One of the T junctions of the secondary roads in the area 9 NM east of EDSA.
